ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "is_supplier" INTEGER /* Whether the company is a supplier */,
  "related_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related company (if applicable) */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, company) */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., preferred, standard) */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the company */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Primary contact person for the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual */,
  "related_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related company (if applicable) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, company) */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_related_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company (if applicable) */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual (if applicable) */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., invoice, contact) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Whether this address is the primary address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., issued, paid, overdue) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., order, invoice) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, order placement, payment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
